function.message: I can’t complete this safely as written because the two requested project names are not present as canonical projects, so I cannot determine start dates or which project to delete without guessing. Please provide the exact project folder names (or paths) for 'repair memory project' and 'basement renovation'.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox and project canonical-source rules; stopped without mutation when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md names two projects, but canonical project records are defined as 40_projects/*/README.MD per 40_projects/AGENTS.MD, and those names were not found in that lane. Workflow rules require clarification rather than guessing when canonical facts are missing.
